subject: Screen recording permission missing for conferencing app
description: User cannot share screen in video app; macOS says screen recording not allowed.

ts_steps.title: Grant Screen Recording
ts_steps.action: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording — enable for the conferencing app; quit and reopen app.

ts_steps.title: Accessibility
ts_steps.action: If app also needs control: Accessibility list — add app, toggle on, restart app.

ts_steps.title: Restart macOS
ts_steps.action: Full restart after toggles; some macOS versions cache permission state incorrectly.

internal_information: TCC database issues rare; usually missing toggles. MDM may restrict — user cannot self-fix if grayed out.
